description_long: A male adult figure is equipped with an expansive, V-shaped mechanical glider apparatus attached to his back, extending far beyond his outstretched arms. The glider wings are sleek and streamlined, with a dark, metallic surface and subtle red accents near the base. The man is dressed in rugged, fitted clothing suitable for urban exploration, including a utility belt and holstered gear at his waist. His stance is upright and confident, with both feet firmly planted and arms slightly apart to accommodate the glider. The glider's structure appears to be made of lightweight metal and composite materials, with visible joints and hinges at the wingtips. The overall appearance suggests a blend of human and advanced technology, designed for personal flight or gliding in an urban environment.
description: A male adult wearing rugged urban clothing is equipped with a large, V-shaped mechanical glider attached to his back, featuring sleek, dark wings and visible gear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's face, torso, and the full span of the glider wings extending outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thin profile of the glider and the man's upright stance, with the wing extending forward and backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the man and the full width of the glider, with visible attachment points and gear.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the glider's profile and the man's side posture.
attribute_clothing_type: utility jacket and fitted pants with tactical accessories
